value.found_quote: Claude Code can connect to hundreds of external tools and data sources through the Model Context Protocol (MCP), an open source standard for AI-tool integrations. MCP servers give Claude Code access to your tools, databases, and APIs.
value.rationale: The page is Anthropic's official Claude Code documentation describing MCP (Model Context Protocol) support and connectors. It details how Claude Code connects to tools via MCP, including remote/local servers, connectors from the Anthropic Directory, and Claude.ai connectors — directly substantiating that Anthropic offers Claude Code MCP & connectors. The offering is presented as currently available with active commands and configuration options.
